#5 JDG RICHARD KOSSOW, ASSIGNED. CSR SANDRA NAYLOR. CLERK G. VAN HEST. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL BRENDA CRUZ KEITH. DEFT NOT PRESENT. ORAL & DOC EVID PRESENTED. CASE SUBMITTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. EXH WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, DEON K THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 OAK ST. #32 S.F. $2,840.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,440.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $900.00 MAY BE CREDITED.
